scripts.build: npm run generate && tsc -b packages/core packages/react packages/vue
scripts.docs:dev: bun run build && bun run --cwd apps/docs dev --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.docs:build: bun run build && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.publish:packages: bun run version:packages && bun run verify && node scripts/publish-icon-packages.mjs
